channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: Wild West Climate
item.description: Makes the west drier, hotter, and more desert-like as you travel across the world.

item.title: RespawnInfo
item.description: Adds a command and a small GUI to check your respawn count and coordinates.

item.title: LRCxRExxSkill
item.description: aaa

item.title: Ice Cold Vessel
item.description: Adds ice-powered cooling to storage vessels for food preservation.

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Equus: Tack and Equipment
item.description: Adds various saddles, bridles, and saddleblankets for Equus and Monoceros

item.title: Blacksmith Gloves V2
item.description: Adds a pair of heavy leather blacksmith gloves for handling hot metal without needing tongs.

item.title: TinkerTailor - Backpacks
item.description: More backpacks & pouches for the veteran seraph. Made with love & pain, No AI.

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: ReelMower
item.description: Push reel mower. Cut grass, Multiplayer in testing

item.title: Julz Addons
item.description: A smol mod made for my mates to have fun in VS

item.title: Simple water tweaks
item.description: This mod modifies the game's water by adding an alternative wave effect and a more vibrant color

item.title: Wind Vanes & Randomized Winds
item.description: Wind vanes that rotate to face the wind direction and spins its rotator based on wind speed.

item.title: WarpModFork
item.description: WarpModFork of WarpMod, Allows players to set and teleport to warp points

item.title: Cloth Shelf
item.description: A shelf for cloth based on Food Shelves by SONZ-INA

item.title: SkullTorchHolder
item.description: A brass torchholder that looks like a skull

item.title: Armor Mannequin
item.description: Uses a variation of the mannequin parts to display armor pieces

item.title: Rust Girls - Player Model
item.description: BE the waifu!

item.title: Uppsalchemy
item.description: A multi-tier alchemy system that uses A Culinary Artillery bottles.

item.title: Wild Farming Fork
item.description: Cultivate flowers, herbs, mushrooms, trees, and shrubs. And much more.

item.title: Only Flower Seeds
item.description: Cultivate vanilla flowers by extracting seeds from them.

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: MrLee's TV Mod
item.description: Watch videos together, in-world

item.title: Dame Elswyth’s Summons
item.description: Find and summon lost pets. Fixes PetAI fire avoidance AI task for tamed pets.

item.title: VSCN Language Pack Updater
item.description: 汉化模组的更新器 VSCN Language Pack Updater

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Hardtack Bread
item.description: Dry, salty, very long-lasting bread. Needs to be softened to eat. Includes two historical dishes.
